steps.expression: async () => { const unique = Date.now(); const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!settings.ok) { throw new Error(settings.error.userMessage); } const modelEntry = Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0); const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; const seedAgent = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Tag Seed Agent ${unique}`, systemPrompt: 'Seed agent for tag flows.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['research'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!seedAgent.ok) { throw new Error(seedAgent.error.userMessage); } const seedCouncil = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `Tag Seed Council ${unique}`, topic: 'Seed council for tag flows', goal: null, mode: 'manual', tags: ['strategy'], memberAgentIds: [seedAgent.value.agent.id], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: modelRefOrNull }); if (!seedCouncil.ok) { throw new Error(seedCouncil.error.userMessage); } window.__taggingScenarioState = { unique, seedAgentId: seedAgent.value.agent.id, seedCouncilId: seedCouncil.value.council.id }; return window.__taggingScenarioState; }

async () => { const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const waitFor = async (predicate, label) => { const started = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - started < 5000) { const result = predicate(); if (result) { return result; } await sleep(50); } throw new Error(`Timed out waiting for ${label}`); }; const clickButton = async (label) => { const button = await waitFor(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === label), `button ${label}`); button.click(); await sleep(100); }; const setFieldValue = (selector, value) => { const field = document.querySelector(selector); if (!(field instanceof HTMLInputElement) && !(field instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement)) { throw new Error(`Missing field ${selector}`); } const prototype = field instanceof HTMLInputElement ? HTMLInputElement.prototype : HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype; const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(field, value); field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return field; }; const commit = (field) => field.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); const unique = window.__taggingScenarioState?.unique; if (typeof unique !== 'number') { throw new Error('Missing tagging scenario state'); } await clickButton('Agents'); await clickButton('New Agent'); await waitFor(() => document.querySelector('#agent-name'), 'agent name input'); setFieldValue('#agent-name', `Tag UX Agent ${unique}`); setFieldValue('#agent-system-prompt', 'Agent created through the standardized tag editor.'); commit(setFieldValue('#agent-tags-input', 'alpha')); await sleep(100); commit(setFieldValue('#agent-tags-input', 'beta')); await sleep(100); const removeAlpha = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag alpha']`), 'remove alpha button'); removeAlpha.click(); await sleep(100); await clickButton('Save'); await waitFor(() => document.querySelector('#home-panel-agents'), 'agents panel'); const filterInput = setFieldValue(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`, 'beta'); filterInput.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); await sleep(200); const clearedAfterBetaCommit = document.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`)?.value === ''; const betaChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag beta']`); const secondFilterInput = setFieldValue(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`, 'follow-up'); secondFilterInput.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ',', bubbles: true })); await sleep(200); const followUpChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag follow-up']`); const betaChipRemoved = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag beta']`) === null; const clearedAfterSecondCommit = document.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`)?.value === ''; await clickButton('Clear filters'); await sleep(150); const seedAgentCard = await waitFor(() => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-agent-card-id='${window.__taggingScenarioState.seedAgentId}']`); return card instanceof HTMLElement ? card : null; }, 'seed agent card'); const researchTagButton = await waitFor(() => Array.from(seedAgentCard.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'research'), 'research tag button'); researchTagButton.click(); await sleep(150); const researchChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag research']`); return { betaFilterApplied: betaChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement, clearedAfterBetaCommit, followUpChipApplied: followUpChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement, betaChipRemoved, clearedAfterSecondCommit, researchFilterApplied: researchChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement }; }

async () => { const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const waitFor = async (predicate, label) => { const started = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - started < 5000) { const result = predicate(); if (result) { return result; } await sleep(50); } throw new Error(`Timed out waiting for ${label}`); }; const clickButton = async (label) => { const button = await waitFor(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === label), `button ${label}`); button.click(); await sleep(100); }; const setFieldValue = (selector, value) => { const field = document.querySelector(selector); if (!(field instanceof HTMLInputElement) && !(field instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement)) { throw new Error(`Missing field ${selector}`); } const prototype = field instanceof HTMLInputElement ? HTMLInputElement.prototype : HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype; const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(field, value); field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return field; }; const commit = (field) => field.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); const unique = window.__taggingScenarioState?.unique; if (typeof unique !== 'number') { throw new Error('Missing tagging scenario state'); } await clickButton('Councils'); await clickButton('Clear filters'); await sleep(100); await clickButton('New Council'); await waitFor(() => document.querySelector('#council-title'), 'council title input'); setFieldValue('#council-title', `Tag UX Council ${unique}`); setFieldValue('#council-topic', 'Council created through the standardized tag editor.'); const memberCheckbox = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector(`.list-grid input[type='checkbox']`), 'member checkbox'); memberCheckbox.click(); await sleep(50); commit(setFieldValue('#council-tags-input', 'delivery')); await sleep(100); commit(setFieldValue('#council-tags-input', 'ops')); await sleep(100); const removeDelivery = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag delivery']`), 'remove delivery button'); removeDelivery.click(); await sleep(100); await clickButton('Save'); await waitFor(() => document.querySelector('#home-panel-councils'), 'councils panel'); const filterInput = setFieldValue(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`, 'ops'); filterInput.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); await sleep(200); const clearedAfterOpsCommit = document.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`)?.value === ''; const opsChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag ops']`); const secondFilterInput = setFieldValue(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`, 'handoff'); secondFilterInput.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ',', bubbles: true })); await sleep(200); const handoffChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag handoff']`); const opsChipRemoved = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag ops']`) === null; const clearedAfterSecondCommit = document.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Filter by exact tag']`)?.value === ''; await clickButton('Clear filters'); await sleep(150); const seedCouncilCard = await waitFor(() => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-council-card-id='${window.__taggingScenarioState.seedCouncilId}']`); return card instanceof HTMLElement ? card : null; }, 'seed council card'); const strategyTagButton = await waitFor(() => Array.from(seedCouncilCard.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'strategy'), 'strategy tag button'); strategyTagButton.click(); await sleep(150); const strategyChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag strategy']`); return { opsFilterApplied: opsChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement, clearedAfterOpsCommit, handoffChipApplied: handoffChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement, opsChipRemoved, clearedAfterSecondCommit, strategyFilterApplied: strategyChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement }; }

async () => { const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const waitFor = async (predicate, label) => { const started = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - started < 5000) { const result = predicate(); if (result) { return result; } await sleep(50); } throw new Error(`Timed out waiting for ${label}`); }; const clickButton = async (label) => { const button = await waitFor(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === label), `button ${label}`); button.click(); await sleep(100); }; const setFieldValue = (selector, value) => { const field = document.querySelector(selector); if (!(field instanceof HTMLInputElement) && !(field instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement)) { throw new Error(`Missing field ${selector}`); } const prototype = field instanceof HTMLInputElement ? HTMLInputElement.prototype : HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype; const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(field, value); field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return field; }; const commit = (field) => field.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); await clickButton('Clear filters'); const seedCouncilCard = await waitFor(() => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-council-card-id='${window.__taggingScenarioState.seedCouncilId}']`); return card instanceof HTMLElement ? card : null; }, 'seed council card'); seedCouncilCard.click(); await clickButton('Config'); const editTagsButton = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Edit tags']`), 'edit tags button'); editTagsButton.click(); await sleep(100); commit(setFieldValue('#council-config-tags-input', 'config')); await sleep(100); const removeStrategy = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag strategy']`), 'remove strategy button'); removeStrategy.click(); await sleep(100); await clickButton('Save'); const tagsRow = await waitFor(() => { const label = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#council-view-panel-config div')).find((node) => node.textContent?.includes('Tags')); return label instanceof HTMLElement ? label : null; }, 'tags row'); const tagsText = tagsRow.textContent ?? ''; const removeConfigFilterChip = document.querySelector(`button[aria-label='Remove tag config']`); return { configTagVisible: tagsText.includes('config'), strategyRemoved: !tagsText.includes('strategy'), configNotFilterChip: !(removeConfigFilterChip instanceof HTMLButtonElement) }; }
